specific_question: What temperature range did Ethan's quality assurance team use for Elexion Automotive's 2025 vehicle models in the 2024 environmental chamber test?
answer: Ethan's quality assurance team tested Elexion Automotive's 2025 vehicles in the environmental chamber from -40 degrees Fahrenheit to 150 degrees Fahrenheit in May 2024, validating that all systems function in extreme weather conditions.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive's control interface design strategy for 2026 EV models prioritize physical buttons and switches by Q3 2025 to reduce the 30% higher control/display problem rate for EVs and achieve PP100 scores below the 266 EV average?
